response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified the song 'Go Beat Crazy' by Fastway based on on-screen credits. 2. Identified the performers as IRyS and Hakos Baelz. 3. Searched for the lyrics of 'Go Beat Crazy' and found them on the Eurobeat Wiki. 4. Mapped the video into three chronological scenes based on visual changes: the initial dance, the interlude graphic, and the subsequent racing-themed performance. 5. Constructed the JSON response with the song title, artist, performers, and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring VTubers IRyS and Hakos Baelz dancing and singing the song 'Go Beat Crazy'. The video features various visual scenes, including dance segments and racing-themed animations.

scenes.description: IRyS and Hakos Baelz perform a choreographed dance to the song 'Go Beat Crazy'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Go Beat Crazy!)
(Go Beat Crazy!)
(Everybody dance, everybody groove, everybody go, go)
(Everybody dance, everybody groove, e-everybody go)
(Go Beat Crazy!)

Beat, beat, baby
Music gets you crazy
Shock me tonight
(Go Beat Crazy!)
Fun, fun, baby
Dancing feeling hazy
Shake out of sight
(Go Beat Crazy!)

And you will spin in a trance
No lovely dovey romance
If you wanna go crazy
Keep on movin' your body 'round
I just wanna feel you go mad!

Everybody dance!
Everybody groove!
Everybody go! Go!
(Go Beat Crazy!)
Step into the dance
Get into the groove
And let the party go!
(Go Beat Crazy!)

Boom, boom, baby
Come and shake your booty
Dig it tonight
(Go Beat Crazy!)
Go, go, baby
Show me that you're ready
Get satisfied
(Go Beat Crazy!)
